py_libraries.ml.metrics package¶

py_libraries.ml.metrics.linear.metrics(true, pred, eps=1e-12)[source]¶

py_libraries.ml.metrics.module module¶

py_libraries.ml.metrics.module.meanAbsoluteErrorNormalised(true, pred, eps=1e-10)[source]¶
py_libraries.ml.metrics.module.symmetricMeanAbsolutePercentageError(true, pred, eps=1e-10)[source]¶

py_libraries.ml.metrics.softmax module¶

py_libraries.ml.metrics.softmax.metrics(true, pred, num_classes=None)[source]¶

Calculate classification metrics for softmax model predictions.

Args:

true (array-like): True class labels. If provided as one-hot encoded, they will be converted. pred (array-like): Predicted probabilities for each class (from the softmax layer).

Returns:
dict: A dictionary containing:

  • ‘accuracy’: Accuracy score.

  • ‘log_loss’: Logarithmic loss (cross entropy).

  • ‘precision’: Weighted precision score.

  • ‘recall’: Weighted recall score.

  • ‘f1’: Weighted F1 score.
